content.text:
Looking at the image, the track is a long straight with the car perfectly centered on the dashed yellow line, with a slight right curve beginning to appear at the far end.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 11, target index = (11+5) % 121 = 16
- Target WP16: x=5.4559, y=0.6841
- Car: x=4.6894, y=0.6864, heading=-0.372°
- dy = 0.6841 - 0.6864 = -0.0023, dx = 5.4559 - 4.6894 = 0.7665
- bearing = atan2(-0.0023, 0.7665) = -0.172°
- delta = -0.172 - (-0.372) = +0.200° → |delta| < 5°, go straight

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.00262m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.378m → well clear on both sides

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Long straight ahead with car essentially centered and heading perfectly aligned with waypoints; delta is near zero so maintain full speed with no steering correction.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track goes left and loops back along y≈2.77.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car is nearly perfectly centered on the straight, heading ~0° (due east).",
    "Right curve starts significantly around WP24-30; prepare to steer right when approaching x~6.4.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.378m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.2578, 4.3836, 4.4840, 4.5920, 4.6894],
    "y": [0.6837, 0.6874, 0.6871, 0.6872, 0.6864],
    "heading": [-0.142, -0.261, -0.324, -0.258, -0.372]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP16 at (5.456, 0.684): bearing=-0.17°, delta=+0.20° → essentially straight, no correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
